title: taraxacum pleniceps
intro: Taraxacum pleniceps, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant with jagged leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and help stimulate the liver and gallbladder. The health benefits of Taraxacum pleniceps include its ability to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support liver health, reduce bloating, and promote overall well-being.
